title: Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Kale Consultants South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Thane-based team.

About Kale Consultants South Asia Partners:
Kale Consultants South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kale Consultants South Asia Partners!
